rationale: The cited paper appears once, in a brief sentence arguing that promotions can convert previously nonpaying users who may then be less resistant to later purchases. This is used as a general supporting reference in the user-segmentation discussion, not as a core theoretical or methodological basis for the WFF models. The citing paper does not build hypotheses, measurements, or identification strategy directly from Dhar et al. (2007), nor does it directly test or extend its mechanism.
